source.body_text_sample:

Careers

We offer a competitive health benefits package and opportunity for training and career advancement. Buhler employees in good standing receive regular hours and regular pay increases. Many also take advantage of Buhler’s excellent training and educational assistance program.

People throughout the Buhler organization take pride in being big enough to compete with anyone, but small enough to create closer relationships. We form personal ties to our suppliers and distribution networks.

You will be valued and appreciated as an individual and you will have the opportunity to work with the very best in modern equipment. Every year the Buhler group of companies reinvest back into their operations by purchasing new or upgrading existing machines. To keep our workforce and manufacturing capability innovative and efficient, many of the brake presses, cutting machines, punches, mills, and lathes are computer controlled.

We have a long record of growth while supporting vigorous research and development in all our product lines, while maintaining a long-term parts supply. Not burdened by the peaks and valleys that come with on-demand manufacturing, Buhler Industries offers a stable level of employment.

View openings

We are constantly updating our resume bank. If you are skilled in the trades and would like to be considered for a position with one of our divisions in Winnipeg or Morden, MB, please contact u
